Account PATCH — send only changed fields (
What changed

All account save operations now send only the fields that actually changed, instead of the entire account payload. If nothing changed, the save is a no-op (no request is made at all).This affects every place in the CRM where account data is saved:
All detail islands (General, Invoicing, Credit, Addresses, Supplier, Commissions, Users, IDs, Tags)
Account address modal
Account approve-for-sales modal
Reassign account modal
Add contact modal
Stage change and supplier approval (FAB actions)
Follow-up flag toggle

add direct account navigation to hierarchy tree view (
This PR enhances the Account Hierarchy tree view by allowing users to navigate directly between accounts from within the tree structure.
Added a "Go to Account" option in the 3-dot context menu for each node in the hierarchy tree.
The navigation option is intelligently hidden for the account currently being viewed to avoid redundant navigation.

Added a visual separator between the new navigation action and existing management actions (Add/Remove parent/child) in the account menu.
goToAccount
translation string to the core account locales.
consolidate order and line-level checklists in Order Line view (

This PR updates the Order Line details page to display a consolidated checklist that includes both line-specific approvals and the overarching order-level approval flags. This provides users with a comprehensive view of all requirements needed to process an order line in a single location.
Updated the

OrderLineHero
to display a combined

OrderChecklistCard
. It now shows Document and Account approvals (Order level) alongside Parameter, Accounts, and Export approvals (Line level).

Integrated permission-based logic to disable checklist items if the user lacks
updateApprovals
rights or if the order line is currently unlocked.

Added
onItemClick
support, allowing users to launch the corresponding approval modals directly from the checklist items.

Introduced logic in
orderApprovalMapper.ts
to combine these data sources and prefix order-level items with
order- to ensure unique identification in the list.
Updated checklist primitives to visually distinguish disabled or non-interactive items.
Refactored checklist statistic calculations into a shared helper function.
Synchronized

DatePickerField
to ensure external value updates are reflected in the UI immediately.

prevent accidental form submission on Enter key press (
This PR addresses an issue in the RFQ creation flow where pressing the **Enter** key while focused on a search or input field would prematurely submit the form and create the RFQ.
Changed

FormikSubmit
button type to
"button"
in

CreateRequestModal
and

CreateRfqLineModal
.
Disables the default browser form submission behavior on

Enter
, ensuring the RFQ is only created when the user explicitly clicks the submit button or triggers it while the button is focused.

Improves user experience by preventing accidental creations during "extended search" and manual data entry.
improve order line manual allocation visibility and permission handling (

This PR resolves an issue where the "Add Allocation" button was missing or improperly handling the read-only state in the Order Line Allocation Details island. It introduces better feedback for users when a line is locked and ensures the island respects section-level permissions.**Key Improvements:**
Updated the

OrderLineDetailsTab
to correctly pass section-level permissions to the Allocation island.

Added a standard lock icon with a tooltip to the island header. This provides immediate visual feedback if the manual allocation button is hidden because the section is read-only or the line is locked.

Resolved a bug in the
createOrderLineAllocationVms
mapper where MPN and Manufacturer details were not being correctly populated from the order line context.
Aligned the island's header and summary behavior with the standard patterns used in other Order Line sections (like Line Details and Alternatives).

Handle backport PRs and simplify currency determination logic (dev only) (
)

This pull request introduces improvements to handle backport PRs more effectively and refines the changelog description cleaning logic. Additionally, it simplifies the logic for determining currency in sourcing request fields, reducing complexity.

Update Eslint and dependencies, suppress lint warnings (
)

This pull request updates Eslint to version 10.1.0 across all packages, suppresses `exhaustive-deps` lint warnings, and modifies configurations. Additionally, the updates address compatibility and security concerns by upgrading related dependencies including Vite.

Update some steps and fix tanstak devtools (dev only) (
)

This pull request simplifies the build configuration by removing an unnecessary editor override in the devtools plugin, directly using `launch-editor` instead of proxying through Vite's `/__open-in-editor` endpoint.
